text: Walking through these clean, modern halls filled with glass and neon blue light, I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. Entering the R+D space brings a heightened awareness of the future, technology, and humanity’s ongoing dance with innovation. The bold and inviting colors stir excitement within me, while the displays prompt contemplation about how we connect and coexist with intelligent machines. I am both the observer and participant in this unfolding story of progress.
